---
title: "GaR analysis"
output:
  rmarkdown::pdf_document:
    latex_engine: xelatex
    number_sections: true
    # includes:
    #         in_header: C:\\Users\\Misha\\Documents\GaR\\GaR-preamble.tex

vignette: >
  %\VignetteIndexEntry{GaR analysis}
  %\VignetteEngine{knitr::rmarkdown}
  %\VignetteEncoding{UTF_8}
---

```{r, include = FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(
  collapse = TRUE, echo = FALSE, message = FALSE,warning = FALSE,
  comment = "#>"
)
```


```{r setup}

devtools::load_all()

library(GaRPackg)

```


```{r load_libraries}

library(tidyselect)

library(tidyverse)

library(quantreg)


```


```{r Import_data}

raw_data = list(osnat_list = import.osnat.data(),
                michael_list = import.michael.data())

raw_data$raw_df = full_join(raw_data$osnat_list$osnat_df,
                            raw_data$michael_list$michael_df,
                            by = "Date") %>% 
  arrange(Date)

```


```{r Set_parameters}

results = list()

parameters_list = list()

parameters_list$quantile_vec = c(0.05,0.25,0.5,0.75,0.95)

parameters_list$horizon_list = list(1,8,12)

parameters_list$drop_series = c("Vacancies_Rate","Telbor_1Y","STARTUP_FP",
                "Term_spread","Sovereigh_spread",
                "Interbank_spread","LT_real_rate_change",
                "TA125_Close","Indus_prod_ind","ILS_EURO",
                "breakeven_inflation_5_10_fwd")


```


```{r Process_data}


credit = raw_data$raw_df %>% 
  select(Date,Credit_to_non_fin_sector) %>% 
  mutate(Credit = Credit_to_non_fin_sector /
           lag(Credit_to_non_fin_sector,12) - 1) %>% 
  select(Date, Credit) %>% 
  filter(complete.cases(.))


house = raw_data$raw_df %>% 
  select(Date,HousePrice_Index) %>% 
  mutate(House = HousePrice_Index / lag(HousePrice_Index,12) - 1) %>% 
  select(Date, House) %>% 
  filter(complete.cases(.))

ca = raw_data$raw_df %>% 
  select(Date,CA, GDP_F) %>% 
  mutate(CA_GDP = CA / GDP_F) %>% 
  filter(complete.cases(.))

inflation = raw_data$raw_df %>% 
  select(Date,CPI) %>% 
  mutate(Inflation = CPI / lag(CPI,4) - 1) %>% 
  select(Date,Inflation) %>% 
  filter(complete.cases(.))


rate = raw_data$raw_df %>% 
  select(Date,BOI_rate) %>% 
  mutate(rate = BOI_rate - lag(BOI_rate,4)) %>% 
  select(Date,rate) %>% 
  filter(complete.cases(.))




x_df = list(credit, house, ca, inflation, rate) %>% 
  reduce(inner_join, by = "Date") %>% 
  mutate_at(.vars = vars(-Date),.funs = list(scale))

rm(credit, house, ca, inflation, rate)


```


```{r plot_GDP_density}

ggplot(raw_data$raw_df %>% 
  select(Date, GDP_real) %>% 
    mutate(GDP_real = log(GDP_real)) %>% 
    mutate(GDP_growth = (lead(GDP_real, 12) - GDP_real) * 4 /12) %>% 
    select(Date, GDP_growth), aes(x = GDP_growth)) + 
  geom_density() + 
  labs(title = "Unconditional density of cumulative GDP growth", y = "",
       x = "GDP 3 year growth (%)") + 
  theme_bw() + 
  theme(axis.text.y = element_blank(), plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5))

```


```{r quantile_reg}

qreq_list = lapply(parameters_list$horizon_list, function(temp_horizon){
  
  gdp_growth = raw_data$raw_df %>% 
    select(Date, GDP_real) %>% 
    mutate(GDP_real = log(GDP_real)) %>% 
    mutate(GDP_growth = (lead(GDP_real, temp_horizon) - GDP_real) * 4 /
             temp_horizon) %>% 
    select(Date, GDP_growth) %>% 
    filter(complete.cases(.))
  
 reg_df = inner_join(gdp_growth, x_df, by = "Date")
    

qreq = rq(formula("GDP_growth ~ Credit + House + CA_GDP + Inflation + rate
                  + lag(GDP_growth,1)"),
          tau = parameters_list$quantile_vec,data = reg_df)

return(qreq)
  
  
})

names(qreq_list) = parameters_list$horizon_list


coeffs_data = lapply(names(qreq_list), function(temp_name){
  
  temp_df = qreq_list[[temp_name]]$coefficients %>% 
    as.data.frame()
  
  temp_df %>% 
    rename_all(.funs = list(~str_remove(.,pattern = "tau= "))) %>% 
    mutate(Variable = rownames(.)) %>% 
    gather(key = Tau,value = GaR, -Variable) %>% 
    mutate(Horizon = temp_name)
  
  
}) %>% 
  bind_rows()

```


```{r plot_coeffs}

ggplot(coeffs_data %>% 
         filter(Tau == 0.05) %>% 
         filter(Variable %in% c("Credit", "House", "CA_GDP")), aes(x = Variable, y = GaR)) + 
  geom_col() + 
  facet_wrap(~Horizon,scales = "free") + 
  theme_bw() + 
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 90))

```
